_source: Neelz & Pender (2013), 'Benchmarking the latest generation of 2D hydraulic modelling packages', Environment Agency report SC120002, Figures 4.41 (p.101) and 4.42 (p.102) - water level time series at Test 8A points 1, 2, 3 and 6 for 19 modelling packages. Local copy: ~/Work/engines/ea_benchmark/SC120002_benchmark_report.pdf
_method: Bands READ OFF THE PUBLISHED FIGURES BY EYE, not digitised - treat as +/- 0.01-0.02 m. Replace with a WebPlotDigitizer trace of the same four panels before quoting these numbers in a deliverable.
_scope: Only points 1, 2, 3 and 6 have published curves; the report shows no time series for points 4, 5, 7, 8 and 9.
_bands: cluster_* excludes the 0-term packages (RFSM Direct, ISIS Fast) and ISIS Fast Dynamic, which the report itself describes as approximate representations; all_* is the full spread across every package shown.

bed_elevation_m._source: elev column of the LISFLOOD-FP .stage output header
